title: sagittaria subulata var. natans
intro: Sagittaria subulata var. natans, also known as the floating arrowhead or American water arum, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Sagittaria genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes of Sagittaria subulata var. natans can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
